name: autodl-remote
description: Bash-only SSH account, command, upload, and download tool layer for AutoDL.

interface.shortDescription: Control AutoDL over SSH from local Codex.
interface.longDescription: Provides SSH account management, remote command execution, and explicit file upload/download primitives. Codex decides what to inspect, push, pull, and run.
defaultPrompt: Use AutoDL Remote to inspect my remote project.
Upload this edited file to AutoDL and run training.
Tail the latest AutoDL training log.
